headline: Cover your summer vacation lodging with these all-time high Marriott card offers

headline: Peloton is launching bikes and treadmills for gyms, accelerating commercial strategy
summary: Peloton is launching commercial gym-ready Bikes and Treads, expanding into gyms globally as it seeks new growth beyond its at-home fitness business.
